scripts.dev:psychotherapy-api: npm run build:core && npm run dev --workspace=apps/psychotherapy-api
scripts.dev:scheduler-api: npm run build:core && npm run dev --workspace=apps/scheduler-api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/psychotherapy-web && npm run build --workspace=apps/scheduler-api && npm run build --workspace=apps/psychotherapy-api && rm -rf dist && cp -r apps/psychotherapy-web/dist dist
